overall.description: A spaceship flies steadily over an icy planet's surface in this high-fidelity game engine footage. The camera follows the craft from behind in third-person perspective as it traverses the planet's curvature, with the blackness of space and distant stars visible above the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: orbital space above glacial planet surface

agents.ego_description: Piloting the spaceship in steady forward flight over the icy planet surface, maintaining consistent altitude and orientation

entered.detail: Expansive white and gray ice-covered terrain stretching to the curved horizon with minimal surface detail
Thin blue atmospheric rim lighting the planet's edge against the darkness of space
Dense scattering of stars visible in the blackness of space above the planetary horizon
Faint greenish nebula gas clouds visible in the distant space background

segments.scene_description: The spaceship flies steadily over a vast expanse of smooth glacial ice, with the curved horizon of the planet visible below and a star-filled sky above. The terrain appears relatively uniform and white, with subtle texturing indicating a frozen surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: orbital space above rugged glacial terrain

events.description: surface terrain transitions from smooth ice to more rugged glacial textures with visible ridges and crevasses

agents.ego_description: Continuing steady flight over the increasingly textured ice surface, maintaining the same altitude and heading

changed.from: smooth uniform ice with minimal detail
changed.to: rugged textured glacier with prominent shadows and geological features

segments.scene_description: As the flight continues, the glacial terrain below becomes increasingly rugged and detailed, revealing deep crevasses and shadowed ridges in the ice. The spaceship maintains its steady course over the evolving landscape, with the atmospheric glow and star field remaining constant in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a spaceship in a continuous flight over an icy planet, transitioning from a smooth glacial expanse into a rugged, fractured landscape. It begins with the craft gliding over a vast, uniform stretch of white ice under a star-filled sky, where the planet's curved horizon remains steady. As the flight continues, the terrain below gradually evolves, shifting from a flat surface to one of increasing complexity. The scene then reveals deep crevasses and shadowed ridges that break the uniformity of the ice, while the atmospheric glow and distant stars remain constant in the background.
